markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content strategy, audit findings, and publishing blockers.](https://fathom.video/share/7AD6sRKeXmK5ojFU7W8oQwik1BcdqRjA?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Audit Delivered:** A new audit prioritizes 40 P1 articles for refresh based on pipeline impact (MQLs, AQLs), with GrowthX owning the work.](https://fathom.video/share/7AD6sRKeXmK5ojFU7W8oQwik1BcdqRjA?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [**Sanity CMS Blockers:** Critical bugs are preventing content updates from publishing and auto-redirecting users to foreign language sites, risking high bounce rates.](https://fathom.video/share/7AD6sRKeXmK5ojFU7W8oQwik1BcdqRjA?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)
  - [**Gated Content Strategy Shift:** All gated guides will be ungated to improve lead quality over quantity, with exceptions for high-ranking content.](https://fathom.video/share/7AD6sRKeXmK5ojFU7W8oQwik1BcdqRjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1485.0)
  - [**Publishing Pipeline:** GrowthX will deliver 6 articles this week (2 new, 4 in progress) to accelerate content indexing and traffic generation.](https://fathom.video/share/7AD6sRKeXmK5ojFU7W8oQwik1BcdqRjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1733.0)

## Topics

### Sanity CMS Blockers

  - [**Publishing Failure:** A recent content refresh failed to publish, and the Sanity document history shows no record of the update.](https://fathom.video/share/7AD6sRKeXmK5ojFU7W8oQwik1BcdqRjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
  - [**Language Redirect Bug:** Users are being auto-redirected to German/Portuguese sites, risking high bounce rates.](https://fathom.video/share/7AD6sRKeXmK5ojFU7W8oQwik1BcdqRjA?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)
      - [**Cause:** Suspected backend cache issue, not user error.](https://fathom.video/share/7AD6sRKeXmK5ojFU7W8oQwik1BcdqRjA?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
      - [**Action:** Mariel will create a web dev request to investigate.](https://fathom.video/share/7AD6sRKeXmK5ojFU7W8oQwik1BcdqRjA?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
  - [**Usability Issues:** The CMS is difficult for marketers to use due to poor search and a rigid component structure that requires web dev requests for simple elements like tables.](https://fathom.video/share/7AD6sRKeXmK5ojFU7W8oQwik1BcdqRjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)

### Content Audit & Refresh Strategy

  - [**Audit Methodology:** Analyzed \>500 URLs from GSC, combining organic traffic data with Netwrix pipeline data (MQLs, AQLs) to create an "opportunity score."](https://fathom.video/share/7AD6sRKeXmK5ojFU7W8oQwik1BcdqRjA?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
  - [**Priority Tiers:**](https://fathom.video/share/7AD6sRKeXmK5ojFU7W8oQwik1BcdqRjA?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
      - [**P1 (40 articles):** High pipeline impact → Full refresh.](https://fathom.video/share/7AD6sRKeXmK5ojFU7W8oQwik1BcdqRjA?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
      - [**P2:** Update title/meta description → Monitor rankings.](https://fathom.video/share/7AD6sRKeXmK5ojFU7W8oQwik1BcdqRjA?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
      - [**P3–P5:** Low-impact content → Lower priority.](https://fathom.video/share/7AD6sRKeXmK5ojFU7W8oQwik1BcdqRjA?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [**Ownership:**](https://fathom.video/share/7AD6sRKeXmK5ojFU7W8oQwik1BcdqRjA?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
      - [**GrowthX:** Owns all P1 refreshes.](https://fathom.video/share/7AD6sRKeXmK5ojFU7W8oQwik1BcdqRjA?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
      - [**Netwrix:** Can handle P2 metadata updates.](https://fathom.video/share/7AD6sRKeXmK5ojFU7W8oQwik1BcdqRjA?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)

### Content Calendar & Production

  - [**Calendar Refinement:** The Airtable calendar is now clean of duplicates and will be updated with Dirk's topic suggestions.](https://fathom.video/share/7AD6sRKeXmK5ojFU7W8oQwik1BcdqRjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)
  - [**New Column:** A "Funnel Stage" column will be added to ensure a focus on Bottom/Middle of Funnel topics.](https://fathom.video/share/7AD6sRKeXmK5ojFU7W8oQwik1BcdqRjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)
  - [**6-Week Plan:** Aida will create a 6-week production plan based on the finalized calendar.](https://fathom.video/share/7AD6sRKeXmK5ojFU7W8oQwik1BcdqRjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1468.0)
  - [**Authoring:**](https://fathom.video/share/7AD6sRKeXmK5ojFU7W8oQwik1BcdqRjA?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
      - [**Requirement:** Use real authors to meet Google E-E-A-T guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/7AD6sRKeXmK5ojFU7W8oQwik1BcdqRjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1884.0)
      - [**Plan:** Use Dirk as the author for the 2 new articles, pending his approval.](https://fathom.video/share/7AD6sRKeXmK5ojFU7W8oQwik1BcdqRjA?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
      - [**Fallback:** A "Netwrix Team" placeholder can be used temporarily for publishing speed.](https://fathom.video/share/7AD6sRKeXmK5ojFU7W8oQwik1BcdqRjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)

### Gated Content Strategy

  - [**Decision:** Ungate all PDF guides to improve lead quality, accepting a temporary drop in lead volume.](https://fathom.video/share/7AD6sRKeXmK5ojFU7W8oQwik1BcdqRjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1485.0)
  - [**Exceptions:** High-ranking blog posts will remain gated.](https://fathom.video/share/7AD6sRKeXmK5ojFU7W8oQwik1BcdqRjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Don't "fix what's not broken."](https://fathom.video/share/7AD6sRKeXmK5ojFU7W8oQwik1BcdqRjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)
      - [**Action:** Add more CTAs (e.g., after intro, mid-page) to these posts to capture more leads.](https://fathom.video/share/7AD6sRKeXmK5ojFU7W8oQwik1BcdqRjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/7AD6sRKeXmK5ojFU7W8oQwik1BcdqRjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1733.0)

      - [Deliver 4 in-progress articles by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/7AD6sRKeXmK5ojFU7W8oQwik1BcdqRjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)
      - [Create 6-week production plan.](https://fathom.video/share/7AD6sRKeXmK5ojFU7W8oQwik1BcdqRjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1468.0)
      - [Add "Funnel Stage" column to calendar.](https://fathom.video/share/7AD6sRKeXmK5ojFU7W8oQwik1BcdqRjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)
      - [Notify Philip of gated content exceptions.](https://fathom.video/share/7AD6sRKeXmK5ojFU7W8oQwik1BcdqRjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)
  - [**Mariel:**](https://fathom.video/share/7AD6sRKeXmK5ojFU7W8oQwik1BcdqRjA?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
      - [Create web dev request for Sanity language bug.](https://fathom.video/share/7AD6sRKeXmK5ojFU7W8oQwik1BcdqRjA?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
      - [Publish the 2 new articles upon Dirk's approval.](https://fathom.video/share/7AD6sRKeXmK5ojFU7W8oQwik1BcdqRjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
  - [**GrowthX Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/7AD6sRKeXmK5ojFU7W8oQwik1BcdqRjA?tab=summary&timestamp=2058.0)
      - [Create "Netwrix Team" author placeholder in Sanity.](https://fathom.video/share/7AD6sRKeXmK5ojFU7W8oQwik1BcdqRjA?tab=summary&timestamp=2058.0)
